Happy New Year
Unit 5 ¬Ζ Lesson 3 ¬Ζ pp.131βÄ™134
πüé· Objective: Talk about New Year's Eve using the simple past (blew up, counted, hugged, wishedβÄΠ) & practise the /e…Σ/ vowel sound (May, day, say, playβÄΠ)
πüîä Let's Pronounce (p.134): /e…Σ/ like "May":  face ¬Ζ day ¬Ζ say ¬Ζ play ¬Ζ wait  |  NOT /e…Σ/:  find ¬Ζ pie ¬Ζ cry ¬Ζ kite ¬Ζ fight ¬Ζ buy
